{{documentation}}
This template displays an infobox for [[quests]].

==Usage==
This template can be used by entering the following on a relevant quest page.

<pre>{{Infobox Quest
|name = 
|image = 
|imagesize = 
|series =
|developer =
}}</pre>

==Parameters==
===name===
The name of the quest.

===image===
An image of the quest.

===imagesize===
An optional size for the image for the quest.

===series===
The quest series, if in a continuation.

===developer===
An option to list the developer, if known.

{{TemplateData|
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"name": {
			"label": "Name",
			"type": "string",
			"description": "The name of the quest.",
			"required": true
		},
		"image": {
			"label": "Image",
			"description": "An image of the quest.",
			"type": "wiki-file-name",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"imagesize": {
			"label": "Image size",
			"description": "An optional size for the image for the quest.",
			"default": "300",
			"type": "number"
		},
		"series": {
			"type": "line",
			"label": "Series",
			"description": "The quest series, if in a continuation",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"developer": {
			"type": "line",
			"label": "Developer",
			"description": "An option to list the developer, if known.",
			"suggested": true
		}
	},
	"description": "Infobox describing a quest.",
	"paramOrder": [
		"name",
		"image",
		"imagesize",
        "series",
        "developer"
	],
	"format": "block"
}
</templatedata>
}}

<includeonly>[[Category:Infobox templates|Quests]]</includeonly>
